name: Ahrefs

composio_registry_match.name: Ahrefs
composio_registry_match.description: Ahrefs is an SEO and marketing platform offering site audits, keyword research, content analysis, and competitive insights to improve search rankings and drive organic traffic

description: A comprehensive SEO and digital marketing tool suite providing extensive data on backlinks, keywords, site health, and search rankings.
notes: Composio reports 40 tools, indicating a mature, broad API surface. Documentation explicitly mentions OAuth2 for integrations and API keys for direct access.
